narrative:
Adams County has 16,939 registered voters, with 51.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.5 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.9% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -20.8% D−R vs -32.7% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
